name: Development Full Implementation
description: Complete Odoo 19 module development workflow: design module, implement models/views, add controllers/OWL, create reports, test, and lint.

steps.name: Design Module
steps.description: Define module scope, dependencies, data model, and user stories

steps.name: Implement Models and Security
steps.description: Build models with fields, compute methods, constraints, ACLs, and record rules

steps.name: Implement Views
steps.description: Create form, tree, kanban, search views and actions using inheritance

steps.name: Implement Controllers and OWL Components
steps.description: Add HTTP controllers, public endpoints, and OWL components where needed

steps.name: Reports and Tests
steps.description: Create QWeb reports, write TransactionCase/HttpCase tests, and configure reports

steps.name: Lint and Validate
steps.description: Run pre-commit hooks, unit tests, and install module in clean database
